description: The two little friends from the previous frames lean on the pool wall — one in pink, one in a blue suit with a red cap and pink goggles — grinning together. A charming 'class besties' image.
A braided Black instructor plays with three small students in the pool using orange dive-stick toys. The over-the-shoulder angle shows the instructor at the heart of a multi-child lesson.
Same group lesson with a plush blue whale float central between the children. One girl holds a purple float while the instructor encourages her.
The braided instructor holds up an orange dive-disc toy for three children gathered around her, a big whale float visible over her shoulder. Classic 'group activity' image.
Same group drill with the kids grabbing different dive toys — one girl with orange, one with a yellow noodle — while the coach keeps them engaged. The scene brims with warm, structured chaos.
The blue whale float drifts beside the braided coach as she hands out orange toys to the kids. A perfect 'pick-your-toy' class moment.
Wider shot of the group activity with the whale float trailing and the three students reaching for yellow-and-orange squirt toys. Shows the busy playful energy of a small-group class.
Group portrait of the braided coach with three girls — pink goggles, teal goggles, blue goggles — all cheesing for the camera at the pool steps. A classic 'end-of-class' team photo.
Same group photo with the kids slightly repositioned, all smiling widely at camera. A second usable take of the team photo.
A third angle of the same group shot with the coach and three girls close together. Essentially interchangeable with 328 and 329 — perfect for carousel content.
Another near-identical group photo with all four smiling — great for picking the 'hero' version of the team shot.
Vertical version of the same group photo with the same four subjects. Ideal for mobile-first layouts or Stories.
A male teen coach hoists a red-haired toddler in palm-print trunks high above the pool, splashes exploding below. Big action, big energy — a prime 'moment of joy' shot.
Wide overhead of a family class — a dad holds a red-haired baby while two older sisters play with pool noodles on the surface. Shows the 'whole family in the water' experience.
Tighter frame of the same family class moment with the dad tossing the baby boy in the pool as the older girls watch. Feels like a real home-video moment.
A braided Black instructor smiles on the pool steps holding a giggling girl in pink goggles, both using a green dive-ring toy. A delightful 'sit and relax' class pause.
Same instructor and pink-goggled girl sit together on the step holding a green dive ring and yellow dive stick. A peaceful 'between-drill rest' moment.
Wider vertical frame of the same pair with the girl holding up the green dive ring triumphantly. Strong hero-image candidate.
Hero-level wide vertical shot: the instructor smiles while the pink-goggled girl holds up the green dive ring in one hand and a yellow dive toy in the other. Could anchor a 'kids program' page.

A braided Center Lane-logo'd instructor stands poolside as a girl in purple goggles leaps off the deck into the water while another goggled student waits behind. The 'jump to coach' drill captured mid-air.
